name: Giotto + CellPhoneDB Spatial Interaction
description: Spatial interaction analysis at cluster level with statistical significance testing. Combines Giotto spatial neighborhoods with CellPhoneDB ligand-receptor statistics. Uses permutation testing to compute z-scores and p-values. Outputs filtered significant interactions. More computationally intensive but provides statistical validation. Best for identifying statistically significant spatial ligand-receptor interactions.

groupby.description: Column in data object to group cells by

file.description: Clustered spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) that must include cluster labels and spatial coordinates

output_config.collection_description: Outputs full interactions, significant interactions, textual summary, and heatmaps.

items.description: CSV file containing Giotto-CPDB-style spatial ligand-receptor interaction results. Columns: 'source' (sender cluster/group identifier), 'target' (receiver cluster/group identifier), 'ligand' (ligand gene identifier), 'receptor' (receptor gene identifier), 'expr_score' (expression-based interaction score), 'spatial_weight' (spatial neighborhood weight based on spatial radius), 'zscore' (z-score from permutation test), 'pvalue' (statistical p-value from permutation test), 'significant' (boolean indicating significance at threshold)
CSV file containing filtered significant Giotto-CPDB interactions (p-value below threshold). Columns: same as giotto_cpdb_results.csv but filtered to include only significant interactions
Text summary report containing analysis parameters and top significant interactions with z-scores and p-values
